title: The Story of Him$ When the Byzantine Commander Marched on Its Muslim Occupants
description: The Story of Him$ When the Byzantine Commander Marched on Its Muslim Occupants. Recorded under the year 17 AH (638–639 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 13.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
